rulings.Case Title: MEISSNER + WURST US VS KELLER & GANNON
rulings.Rulings: Keller&Gannon Motion for Summary Judgment: GRANT. Plaintiff's claims are barred by contract's limitation of liability to insurance proceeds. Plaintiff failed to raise a triable issue of fact re limitation being against public policy or disadvantage in bargaining power. Crowell v Dallas Housing Authority (Tex. 1973) 495 S.W.2d 887, 889. Fair Notice doctrine does not apply because this is not a release for Defendant's own negligence in advance. See Dresser Industries Inc v Page Petroleum Inc (Tex 1993) 853 S.W.2d 505, 508 fn1. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: MEISSNER + WURST US VS KELLER & GANNON
rulings.Rulings: Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Adjudication: DENY. (CW)
